Text.Page:
The tension between the princesses still isn't resolved.

With all the troubles assailing the kingdom, we need unity, but no one's going to listen to a mere maid.

Would you ask Ronelyn to intervene? Perhaps she can set up a meeting.

Still? Forget fox and squirrel. Those two are ox and mule.

Sujai's right—now's not the time for fractious arguments. So stupid.

All right. I'll ask Lienyn to approach the queen. Perhaps she can force the matter out into the open.
